small.name: Typical Enterprise Data Center
small.notes: Single-tenant enterprise; Tier II; 1-2 MW IT load; on-campus or colocation

medium.name: Equinix DC-series (typical)
medium.notes: Colocation facility; Tier III; 10-20 MW IT load; multiple data halls

large.name: Meta Prineville Data Center
large.notes: Hyperscale campus; custom cooling; on-site substation; multiple buildings

space_library.name: Security Lobby / Mantrap
notes: Mantrap / sally port entry; biometric access; visitor badge station; single point of entry

space_library.name: Security Operations Center (SOC)
notes: CCTV wall; access control monitoring; visitor management; sightline to mantrap

space_library.name: Server Hall / Data Hall / White Space
notes: 150-250 W/SF IT load; raised floor (24-36 in) or overhead cooling; hot/cold aisle containment; 10-12 ft clear above raised floor; 250 PSF floor load min; FM-200 or Novec fire suppression; VESDA smoke detection

bim.classification_description: Server Hall / Data Hall / White Space

parti.parti_name: Server Hall / Data Hall / White Space

space_library.name: Network Operations Center (NOC)
notes: Video wall; tiered operator desks; raised floor; redundant power; near but separated from data halls; acoustic isolation

space_library.name: Meet-Me Room / Cross-Connect
notes: Carrier-neutral interconnect; fiber entrance; cable tray to all data halls; diverse entry paths

space_library.name: UPS Room / Battery Room
notes: 2N or 2N+1 redundancy; lithium-ion or VRLA batteries; hydrogen detection for lead-acid; 250+ PSF floor load; dedicated cooling; code-required ventilation

space_library.name: Power Distribution Unit (PDU) Room
notes: Step-down transformers; bus duct to server hall; RPP panels; monitoring; adjacent to data halls to minimize copper runs

space_library.name: Main Electrical Room
notes: Medium voltage switchgear; ATS; utility transformer vault; NEC arc-flash clearances; dual utility feeds for Tier III+

space_library.name: Generator Yard / Room
notes: Diesel gensets; 48-72 hr fuel storage; day tanks; sound attenuation; exhaust stacks; N+1 or 2N redundancy; noise ordinance compliance

space_library.name: Fuel Storage
notes: Above-ground or below-ground tanks; secondary containment; SPCC plan; truck access for refueling

space_library.name: Cooling Plant / CRAH / CRAC
notes: Chilled water plant or DX; cooling towers or dry coolers on roof/yard; free cooling economizer; PUE target 1.2-1.4; N+1 redundancy min

space_library.name: Equipment Staging / Burn-In
notes: Rack/server staging; imaging; burn-in testing; workbenches; between loading and data halls

space_library.name: Loading / Receiving
notes: Drive-in door for full racks; dock height; security inspection zone; no public access

space_library.name: Break Room / Staff Area
notes: 24/7 operations staff; food storage; microwave; outside data hall environment

space_library.name: Restrooms
notes: Low occupancy; near NOC and break room

space_library.name: Office / Admin
notes: Facility manager; customer cage coordinators; conference room

plan_archetypes.notes: Bar for linear server hall layout; double-loaded for hot/cold aisle optimization
